svg.title: Timeline of synthetic protein milestones, 1953 to present
svg.desc: A vertical thermometer-style timeline showing key milestones in genetic code discovery and synthetic biology from 1953 to 2020s
svg.text: All 64 codons mapped to amino acids
Recombinant DNA — Cohen & Boyer splice genes
Human insulin gene cloned into E. coli

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Humulin and the first synthetic protein')
g.text: Humulin approved — first synthetic human protein

svg.text: EPO, Factor VIII, tPA, interferons in production
Monoclonal antibody era — Humira, Herceptin, Rituxan

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do mRNA vaccines relate to synthetic biology?')
g.text: mRNA vaccines — delivering the instruction, not the protein
